questions_by_commandment.title: I am the Lord your God: you shall not have strange Gods before me.
questions: Have I doubted or denied the existence of God?
Have I put money, career, status, or technology before God?
Have I engaged in superstitious practices, magic, or occultism?
Have I failed to pray daily?

questions_by_commandment.title: You shall not take the name of the Lord your God in vain.
questions: Have I used God's name in anger or carelessly?
Have I spoken disrespectfully about the Church or holy things?
Have I broken a solemn vow, oath, or promise to God?

questions_by_commandment.title: Remember to keep holy the Lord's Day.
questions: Have I deliberately missed Mass on Sundays or Holy Days of Obligation?
Have I treated Sunday as a day like any other, without rest or worship?
Have I received Holy Communion while in a state of mortal sin?
Have I been distracted or disrespectful during Mass?

questions_by_commandment.title: Honor your father and your mother.
questions: Have I been disrespectful, rebellious, or ungrateful to my parents or elders?
Have I neglected to care for my aging parents or relatives?
Have I failed in my duty to correct or spiritually nurture my children?

questions_by_commandment.title: You shall not kill.
questions: Have I held anger, hatred, or resentment toward another person?
Have I been physically or verbally abusive?
Have I encouraged, supported, or participated in abortion, euthanasia, or suicide?
Have I harmed my body with drugs, excessive alcohol, or reckless behavior?

questions_by_commandment.title: You shall not commit adultery.
questions: Have I been unfaithful to my spouse in thought, word, or action?
Have I engaged in sexual activity outside of marriage?
Have I viewed pornography or impure images?
Have I dressed or acted in a way that incited lustful thoughts in others?

questions_by_commandment.title: You shall not steal.
questions: Have I stolen, cheated, or committed fraud, no matter how small?
Have I failed to return borrowed items or money?
Have I been dishonest in my work, taxes, or business dealings?
Have I been wasteful of resources or failed to help the poor?

questions_by_commandment.title: You shall not bear false witness against your neighbor.
questions: Have I told lies, even small ones?
Have I gossiped or harmed the reputation of others?
Have I been quick to judge others without knowing the full truth?
Have I refused to admit when I was wrong or apologize?

questions_by_commandment.title: You shall not covet your neighbor's wife.
questions: Have I entertained impure thoughts or desires for someone else's spouse?
Have I used others as objects in my imagination?

questions_by_commandment.title: You shall not covet your neighbor's goods.
questions: Have I been envious of what others possess (their money, talents, or happiness)?
Have I complained excessively about what I lack instead of being grateful?

specific_states.title: For Married Couples
questions: Have I failed to show love and support to my spouse today?
Have I been selfish or insisted on my own way in the home?
Have I failed to be open to new life within our marriage?
Have I neglected the spiritual or moral education of our children?
Have I held grudges against my spouse instead of forgiving?

specific_states.title: For Single Adults
questions: Have I used my time and freedom solely for myself rather than in service to others?
Have I been impatient with my current state in life?
Have I failed to practice chastity in my relationships?
Have I neglected my spiritual growth or service to the Church?

specific_states.title: For Teenagers
questions: Have I been disobedient or talked back to my parents?
Have I been lazy in my schoolwork or chores?
Have I joined in when others were bullying or mocking someone?
Have I experimented with drugs, alcohol, or vaping?
Have I been honest with my parents about where I am and who I'm with?
Have I used social media to hurt others or viewed inappropriate content?

closing.act_of_contrition: O my God, I am heartily sorry for having offended Thee, and I detest all my sins because of thy just punishments, but most of all because they offend Thee, my God, who art all good and deserving of all my love. I firmly resolve with the help of Thy grace to sin no more and to avoid the near occasion of sin. Amen.
